title: Letter to Emily — pseudo love letter, McGregor quote, change-as-constant
html:
Letter to Emily — pseudo love letter, McGregor quote, change-as-constant

Source: 2026-01-29 Google Doc. Yahir's most explicit love-letter-to-Emily in the corpus to date. Stream-of-conscious, declares himself, references the McGregor manifesto line.

TL;DR

  • The declaration: "I want you. I want you to be with me. I think I need you." — explicit, no hedging. Compare to the Aug 2025 doc which was "do you see a future with Emily — no."
  • The vivid mundane fantasy: morning wake-up nudges, scruff against her sleepy face, kissing her thousand times after pinning her arms in playful wrestling. Specificity is the point — these are domestic-life images, not romance-fantasy.
  • The "change is the only constant" frame: cites Fabian's elbow tattoo. Yahir uses it to argue: lots will change, but "I want to dance with you" is the constant.
  • Emily's own quote echoed back: she said "this wanting and wishing shit is getting kind of old" — Yahir agrees, says he's a yearner who doesn't stay in yearning, then quotes the Connor McGregor "if you can see, and you have the courage to speak it, then it will happen" line. Same line shows up in the Im moving to Austin doc and the Are we fucked doc.
  • Self-aware closer: "I love you Emily. And I hope you enjoyed my pseudo love letter." — labels it pseudo, owning the performative element.

Pattern observed

This is a major inflection in the Emily arc. In Aug 2025 Yahir explicitly didn't see a future. By late January 2026 he's writing love letters. The trip-planning March trip doc follows immediately, then the March visit doc later. Emily has moved from "girl I'm fond of" to declared want.

The McGregor line "if you can see and have courage to speak it, then it will happen" is now the operating credo across all 2025-2026 manifesto docs — it's the same template applied to Austin, to Rankett, to Emily. The wanting → speaking → manifesting loop.

Key quotes

  • "You are mine, and I am yours."
  • "I am a yearner, dreamer, and wanter of divine things, but i dont stay in that state. I like having clarity about what I want then go and get it."
  • "if you can see, and you have the courage to speak it, then it will happen" (McGregor, recurring)

Open questions

  • Did Emily ever read this? (The "pseudo love letter" framing suggests it may have been shared, but unconfirmed.)
  • The Medici Coffee location reference — Austin location? Where did Yahir visualize being while writing?
  • Fabian — old friend, identity unclear. Single mention.

Related

  • the emily arc
  • 2025 08 14 emily
  • 2026 02 03 emily and i march trip (if exists)
  • 2026 03 06 emily visit (if exists)
